---
# Copyright © 2023-2026 ValidMind Inc. All rights reserved.
# Refer to the LICENSE file in the root of this repository for details.
# SPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0 AND ValidMind Commercial
title: "View settings activity"
date: last-modified
---

Track information events associated with your organization's settings. Audit a history of administrative updates made on your organization, including changes to users and permissions, workflows and integrations, customization options, and more.

:::: {.attn}

## Prerequisites

- [x] {{< var link.login >}}
- [x] You are a [{{< fa hand >}} Customer Admin]{.bubble} or assigned another role with sufficient permissions to view organization settings activity.[^1]

::::

## View settings activity

The organization **{{< fa bolt >}} Activity** page shows a history of updates to configuration settings for the selected organization, such as:

- Roles and permissions.[^1]
- Users and invites.[^2]
- Organization settings.[^3]
- Groups and business units.[^4]
- Workflows.[^5]
- Record configuration, including record fields and record page layouts.[^6]
- Artifact configuration, including artifact types and custom fields.[^7]
- Custom fields.[^6]
- Governance settings, including validation guidelines, assessment options, regulations, and policies.[^8]
- Document settings, including document types, templates, and checker configuration.[^9]
- Webhook secrets and other integration secrets.[^10]
- Page layouts.[^11]

To review settings activity for your organization:

1. In the left sidebar, click **{{< fa wifi >}} Activity**.

2. Select the **Settings Activity** tab. To narrow down settings activity by category, click on:

    - **All** to view all settings activity.
    - **Page Layouts** to view activity related to page layout customizations.^
    - **Roles** to view activity related to role assignments and permissions.^
    - **Users** to view activity related to user account management and invitations.^
    - **Organization Settings** to view activity related to organization-level settings and configuration.^
    - **Groups and Business Units** to view activity related to group and business unit management.^
    - **Workflows** to view activity related to workflow configuration and execution.^
    - **Record Configuration** to view activity related to record field and layout customizations.^
    - **Artifact Configuration** to view activity related to artifact field and layout customizations.^
    - **Custom Fields** to view activity related to custom field management and usage.^

<!-- FOOTNOTES -->

[^1]: [Manage permissions](/guide/configuration/manage-permissions.qmd)

<!-- [^2]: [Manage users](/guide/configuration/manage-users.qmd)

[^3]: [Set up your organization](/guide/configuration/set-up-your-organization.qmd)

[^4]: [Manage groups](/guide/configuration/manage-groups.qmd)

[^5]: [Configure workflows](/guide/workflows/configure-workflows.qmd)

[^6]: [Manage inventory fields](/guide/inventory/manage-inventory-fields.qmd)

[^7]: [Manage artifact fields](/guide/validation/manage-artifact-fields.qmd)

[^8]: [Customize {{< var validmind.checker >}}](/guide/templates/customize-document-checker.qmd)

[^9]: [Manage document types](/guide/templates/manage-document-types.qmd)

[^10]: [Manage secrets](/guide/integrations/manage-secrets.qmd)

[^11]: [Customize record overview pages](/guide/inventory/customize-record-overview-page.qmd) -->
